issues.description: Missing conditional logic. Effect has two components: (1) optional FlipLife action, (2) conditional trash action only if opponent has 7+ cards in hand. DSL only includes FlipLife and lacks the hand-count condition and trash action entirely.
Missing ForceDiscard action. Card text specifies 'trash up to 1 card from opponent's Life cards' but DSL contains no trash/discard action.
Missing condition checking opponent's hand size (7 or more cards). The trash action is only supposed to trigger if this condition is met.
